title: Minecraft All-Dimension Superflat
description:
Survive and conquer Minecraft when every dimension is an endless Superflat world.
This datapack transforms the Overworld, Nether, and End into challenging flat landscapes for the ultimate survival or speedrun experience.
body:
Can you survive and defeat the Ender Dragon when **every single dimension is flat**?  
This datapack transforms the **Overworld**, **Nether**, and **End** into endless **superflat worlds**, creating the ultimate Minecraft survival challenge.  

🎥 Originally created for [Baablu](https://www.youtube.com/@Baablu)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FvcSdLy0Vi8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## ⚡ Features
- All **dimensions are flat** – not just the Overworld.  

## 🔧 How to Install
1. Download the datapack.  
2. Place it inside your world’s **datapacks** folder.   
3. Start a new world and see if you can beat Minecraft when it’s all flat!
